headline: ₹0-10 Cr at risk (reputational only) — Adani Power named UNESCO World Engineering Day 2026 partner, boosting social license and global profile
what_matters: No P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
Triggers BRSR, GRI, DJSI, ESRS frameworks, but no new obligations or penalties.
No material change to cost of capital or bond spreads; FII flows unaffected.
